name: open-second-brain
description: Plugin-first second brain package for AI agents and humans.
author: Open Second Brain contributors

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show Open Second Brain configuration status.

commands.name: doctor
commands.description: Run vault, config, and plugin manifest health checks.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a sandbox or production vault profile.

commands.name: index
commands.description: Regenerate the vault wiki index from Markdown pages.

commands.name: append-event
commands.description: Append an agent event to the daily Markdown event log.

commands.name: export-config
commands.description: Write a redacted configuration snapshot as JSON.

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Run the optional MCP tool server over stdio (JSON-RPC 2.0).

commands.name: uninstall
commands.description: Print an uninstall plan; --apply-local removes only the machine-local config directory.

commands.name: vault-log
commands.description: Compatibility wrapper for appending event log entries.
